text:

> Synopsis: [patch] www/red5 remove user data while reinstalling updating

>
> New patch at:
>
> http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/www-red5-userdata.diff
>

> complain :)

Sounds good to me. As far as I test it doesn't remove user data anymore.
Joris
